aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before children.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after children.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

iconsPosition.description:
Determines whether icons are absolutely or statically rendered. For single inputs,
absolute rendering is typically preferred.

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

isDropdown.description: Controls the adding of and visibility of a down arrow icon

inputId.description: Connects the prepend and append labels to the input

wrapperProps.description: Allows passing optional additional props to `.euiFormControlLayout__childrenWrapper`
